profile.name: Ashrit Raghupatruni
profile.title: Computer Science Undergraduate
profile.summary: Ashrit Raghupatruni is a motivated computer science undergraduate with hands-on experience in full-stack web development and machine learning. He is seeking a software development or AI/ML internship to apply his skills and contribute to impactful real-world projects. With a strong foundation in programming languages and web development, Ashrit is a promising talent in the tech industry.

responsibilities: Built and deployed responsive web interfaces using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, ensuring cross-device compatibility across mobile, tablet, and desktop screen sizes. Refactored component rendering logic, reducing average page load time by 30% and eliminating layout shift on mobile viewports.

Built and evaluated 3 NLP-based text classification models, achieving up to 87% accuracy, and deployed them as REST APIs for internal testing workflows. Automated data preprocessing pipeline reducing manual preparation time by 40%, enabling faster model iteration cycles.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.title: OpsMind AI - Enterprise SOP Intelligence Agent
projects.description: Built a full-stack RAG-based system to transform SOP documents into an AI-powered assistant using React, Node.js, and MongoDB, enabling natural language querying of enterprise documents. Implemented semantic retrieval with vector embeddings and integrated Gemini AI to generate context-aware responses with real-time streaming via SSE.

projects.title: Crop Disease Detection (SIH Project)
projects.description: Architected a CNN-based image classification model to detect crop diseases from leaf images and generate actionable remediation insights for farmers. Streamlined the prediction pipeline and output presentation to improve end-user usability and interpretation accuracy.

projects.title: Movie Recommendation System
projects.description: Built a content-based and collaborative filtering recommendation engine that delivers personalized movie suggestions based on user preferences and viewing history.

projects.title: Excuse & Apology Generator (AI-Based)
projects.description: Designed a Python NLP tool to generate context-aware, tone-adjusted responses with customization options for urgency, situation type, and formality level.

projects.title: Student Record Management System
projects.description: Engineered a CRUD-based system to manage 50+ student records with structured data storage, efficient retrieval, and a clean CLI interface.
